plugins.name: elixir-ash-zway
plugins.description: An plugin which converts the way how zebbra works to use Ash Framework to the LLM World!.

plugins.name: commit-convention
plugins.description: Enforces conventional commit message format with short, precise messages and no co-author attribution.

plugins.name: dependabot-merge
plugins.description: Finds all open Dependabot PRs, merges them into a single branch, validates everything (tsc, tests, Docker build), and creates a combined PR.
